overall.description: A slow first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk food stall in a game engine, featuring vibrant neon lighting, rising steam from food warmers, and digital menu boards. The camera moves steadily forward through the narrow commercial space as an NPC approaches from the background and interacts with the service counter.

agents.ego_description: moving slowly forward behind the food service counter, observing the steam and neon-lit interior

entered.detail: heated display case emitting steam with a metal pan inside
glowing blue digital displays showing menu items mounted on the left wall
traditional Japanese-style red lanterns with white characters hanging from the ceiling
vibrant purple fluorescent light running along the ceiling beam
stainless steel preparation counter with various kitchen items

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from behind a food counter in a dimly lit cyberpunk market stall. Steam rises from a heated display case on the right while neon purple lights and red paper lanterns illuminate the narrow corridor. Digital menu screens glow cyan on the left wall as the camera slowly pushes forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial corridor with neon lighting

events.description: a person in a yellow jacket becomes visible in the background walking toward the counter

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the stall as an NPC approaches from the distant background

notable_agents.action: walking toward the service counter from the back of the stall

entered.detail: character wearing a bright yellow jacket and dark pants walking toward the camera
industrial stoves and preparation tables visible in the background kitchen area
large cylindrical metal bin positioned in the middle of the walkway

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances deeper into the narrow stall, a character wearing a yellow jacket emerges from the neon-lit background and walks toward the counter. The food warmer falls behind the camera's view while cooking equipment and a metal trash can become visible ahead. The red lanterns now hang directly overhead as the space opens slightly into a back corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall customer interaction area at the counter

events.description: the NPC reaches the service counter and leans forward with arms spread across the surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the NPC who has stopped at the counter and is leaning forward in a waiting posture

notable_agents.action: leaning on the counter with arms spread wide, facing toward the camera direction

entered.detail: metal shakers and containers sitting on the counter surface
opening leading to an exterior alleyway visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character in yellow reaches the metal service counter and leans forward with arms spread across the surface, appearing to wait for service. The camera continues its slow forward movement, bringing the NPC into close proximity while condiment bottles on the counter come into sharp focus. The digital menu screens recede into the background on the left as a doorway to an exterior alley becomes visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk food stall that transitions from a narrow service area into a more open back corridor. It begins behind a food counter where steam rises from a heated display case and cyan digital menus glow against a backdrop of purple neon and red paper lanterns. As the camera pushes forward, the food warmer recedes and a character in a yellow jacket emerges from the neon-lit background, walking toward the viewer while the lanterns shift to hang directly overhead. The scene then opens further to reveal cooking equipment and a metal trash can before the character reaches the service counter and leans forward. Finally, the camera brings the NPC and nearby condiment bottles into sharp focus as the digital screens fade into the distance and a doorway to an exterior alley comes into view.
